design_philosophy: Premium AI Voice Interaction UI. Distraction-free, immersive, 'Liquid Glass' aesthetic. Dark slate base to reduce cognitive load during language learning, infused with deep indigo (brand/AI) and glowing emerald (success/coach corrections).

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers to allow glassmorphism to breathe.
layout.grid_system: Bento grid for Admin Dashboard and Level selection. Centered focused layouts for the Lesson Session.
layout.cards: Never use solid borders for cards. Always use Glassmorphism (bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10). No sharp edges; use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white font-medium rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(99,102,241,0.4)]
buttons.secondary_glass: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 text-white font-medium rounded-full px-8 py-4 backdrop-blur-md transition-all duration-300

components.header: Sticky with 'Crystal Glass' effect (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10). Must not block hero content.
components.correction_card: Emerges dynamically (Framer Motion). Glassmorphic panel with Emerald accent border (border-emerald-500/30) and subtle inner glow.
components.audio_visualizer: Central hero element during Lesson Session. Multiple animated vertical bars or radiating rings using Indigo and Emerald gradients.
components.vocabulary_hint: Floating badge or subtle side-panel using soft slate glassmorphism. Text should be legible (white text on dark glass).

motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Smooth fade and slight vertical lift (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0) using framer-motion.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All glass cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase border opacity (border-white/20).
motion_and_interaction.voice_active: Pulsing animation around the microphone button and active sound wave rendering.

images.description: Abstract dark blue and black wavy pattern, perfect for the landing page background behind glassmorphism panels.
Dark blue fabric with soft light reflections for ambient background in the dashboard.
Abstract glowing neon streaks for dynamic highlights during voice coaching.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and glassmorphism aesthetic specified.
Ensure all backgrounds beneath glass layers use the provided media URLs with absolute positioning, object-cover, and appropriate opacity (e.g., opacity-30).
Install and use 'framer-motion' for all UI animations (correction cards entering, audio waves).
Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Ensure they are sized appropriately and inherit text color.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Use standard raw HTML elements with Tailwind instead of heavily abstracted UI library wrappers for complex marketing layouts to preserve custom spacing and glass styles.
For the audio visualizer, simulate the Gemini Live API real-time voice using CSS/Framer motion arrays if actual audio stream mapping is too complex for the MVP.
In Tailwind config, make sure to add 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' to theme.extend.fontFamily.
